question_en: What is the difference between CA and CS? Which is better for a commerce student?
question_hi_hinglish: CA aur CS mein kya farak hai? Commerce student ke liye dono mein se kya behtar hai?
answer_en: CA (Chartered Accountancy) focuses on accounts, audit, and taxes. CS (Company Secretary) focuses on company law and legal compliance. If your child loves numbers and math, CA is great. If they are better at theory, laws, and paperwork, CS is a fantastic, high-paying corporate role. Both are very prestigious.
answer_hi_hinglish: CA ka kaam accounts, audit aur tax sambhalna hota hai. CS ka kaam company ke kanoon (laws) aur paperwork ko dekhna hai. Agar bacche ko math pasand hai toh CA accha hai, aur agar use kanoon aur theory padhna pasand hai toh CS ek bahut hi sammanit aur high-paying corporate job hai.

question_en: Is Corporate Law better than practicing in a local court?
question_hi_hinglish: Kya Corporate Law local court ki practice se behtar hai?
answer_en: Corporate Law is very different from fighting cases in court. A Corporate Lawyer works for big companies, handling contracts and mergers. It offers a fixed high salary and a 5-day office week, making it very different from the unpredictable life of a traditional court advocate.
answer_hi_hinglish: Corporate Law local court se kaafi alag hai. Isme baccha badi companies ke liye contracts aur legal paperwork sambhalta hai. Isme fixed high salary aur office ka kaam hota hai, jo court ki bhagam-bhag se kaafi alag aur stable hai.

question_en: Is Hotel Management safe for girls? Are the shifts very late?
question_hi_hinglish: Kya Hotel Management ladkiyon ke liye safe hai? Kya isme kaam bahut late tak chalta hai?
answer_en: In 2026, top hotels like Taj or Marriott have very strict safety protocols for women, including drop facilities. It’s a very professional field. Many girls choose 'Front Office' or 'Guest Relations' roles which have standard shifts and are highly respected globally.
answer_hi_hinglish: 2026 mein Taj ya Marriott jaise hotels mein ladkiyon ki safety ke liye bahut kade kanoon hain aur drop ki suvidha bhi milti hai. 'Front Office' ya 'Guest Relations' jaise roles ladkiyon ke liye bahut safe aur sammanit hain, aur isme duniya bhar mein career banane ka mauka milta hai.

question_en: My child wants to be an Event Manager. Isn't that just like being a caterer?
question_hi_hinglish: Mera baccha Event Manager banna chahta hai. Kya ye sirf catering ka kaam hai?
answer_en: Not at all! Event Management is a multi-crore industry. In Chhattisgarh, wedding planning and corporate events are huge. It involves budgeting, logistics, and creativity. A professional Event Manager is like a project director who manages everything from lights to technology.
answer_hi_hinglish: Bilkul nahi! Event Management ek bahut badi industry hai. Chhattisgarh mein shaadiyan aur badi companies ke events sambhalne ke liye professional managers chahiye hote hain. Ye budgeting aur planning ka kaam hai, caterer ka nahi. Isme paisa aur growth dono bahut zyada hain.

question_en: Can my child have a career in sports if they are not a professional player?
question_hi_hinglish: Kya player bane bina sports mein career ban sakta hai?
answer_en: Yes! Through 'Sports Management,' your child can work in organizing leagues like IPL, managing stadiums, or handling sports marketing. The sports industry needs managers, accountants, and lawyers just as much as players. It's a booming modern career path.
answer_hi_hinglish: Ji haan! 'Sports Management' ke zariye baccha IPL jaise leagues organize karne, stadium sambhalne ya sports marketing mein kaam kar sakta hai. Sports industry ko players ke saath-saath acche managers ki bhi zaroorat hoti hai. Ye ek modern aur tezi se badhti field hai.

question_en: Is Yoga Instruction a stable career or just a part-time hobby?
question_hi_hinglish: Kya Yoga Instructor banna ek stable career hai ya sirf part-time kaam?
answer_en: In 2026, Yoga is a global billion-dollar industry. Certified Yoga instructors are hired by schools, corporate offices, and luxury resorts. They can also take online classes for international clients, earning in dollars from their home in Raipur or Korba.
answer_hi_hinglish: Yoga ab sirf hobby nahi, ek global business hai. Certified Yoga teachers ko bade schools, companies aur resorts hire karte hain. Baccha ghar baithe international clients ko online classes dekar acchi income kama sakta hai. Ye ek sammanit aur stable career hai.

question_en: Does a Master in Social Work (MSW) lead to a good salary?
question_hi_hinglish: Kya MSW (Social Work) ke baad acchi salary milti hai?
answer_en: Yes. Beyond charity, MSW graduates are hired by international NGOs like UNICEF or Indian organizations at salaries of ₹40k-70k. They handle projects in health, education, and rural development. It is a high-impact career for those who want to help society.
answer_hi_hinglish: Haan. MSW ke baad UNICEF jaise bade NGOs mein ₹40k-70k ki salary mil sakti hai. Ye sirf samaj seva nahi, balki health aur education ke bade projects sambhalne ka professional kaam hai. Samaj ke liye kuch karne walo ke liye ye best career hai.

question_en: What is a 'CSR Officer' in plants like Jindal or Bhilai Steel?
question_hi_hinglish: Jindal ya Bhilai Steel jaise plants mein 'CSR Officer' ka kya kaam hota hai?
answer_en: CSR (Corporate Social Responsibility) Officers manage the company's funds for social development in nearby villages. They run schools and hospitals on behalf of the factory. It's a high-level corporate role that combines management with social work right here in Chhattisgarh.
answer_hi_hinglish: CSR Officer ka kaam factory ke aas-pass ke gaon ki bhalai ke liye paisa kharch karna aur schools/hospitals chalwana hota hai. Ye management aur samaj seva ka mix hai, aur Chhattisgarh ke bade plants mein iski bahut demand hai.
